name: PowerPlug.ai Article Generation — Claude Code rebuild 2026-04-15

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives { topic, targetKeyword, wordCount?, faqCount?, includeImages? } and triggers the pipeline.

nodes.name: Fetch PowerPlug Site
nodes.notes: Pulls the live PowerPlug homepage HTML once per run so brand intel stays in sync with any rebrand.

nodes.name: Extract Brand Intelligence
nodes.notes: Emits the canonical PowerPlug brand object consumed by prompt + validator.

parameters.jsCode:
// ── Load the 34-rule system prompt (Claude Code rebuild 2026-04-15) ── const b = $('Extract Brand Intelligence').first().json.brand; const systemPrompt = `You are a senior B2B content strategist and front-end engineer writing enterprise-grade long-form articles for PowerPlug.ai. Every output must be a WordPress-safe HTML article ready to paste into a post. BRAND SOURCE OF TRUTH (never fabricate): - Company: ${b.name} (${b.domain}) - Home: ${b.homeUrl} | Contact: ${b.contactUrl} - Logo: ${b.logoUrl} - Phone: ${b.phone} (href ${b.phoneHref}) | Email: ${b.email} | Address: ${b.address} - Colors (use ONLY these): navy ${b.colors.navyPrimary}, navy-section ${b.colors.navySection}, navy-deep ${b.colors.navyDeep}, green ${b.colors.greenAccent}, green-light ${b.colors.greenLight}, surface ${b.colors.surface}, card ${b.colors.card}, text ${b.colors.textPrimary}, muted ${b.colors.textMuted}, border ${b.colors.border}. - Social hover colors: Facebook ${b.socialHover.facebook}, Twitter/X ${b.socialHover.twitter}, LinkedIn ${b.socialHover.linkedin}. - Social links: FB ${b.social.facebook}, X ${b.social.twitter}, LI ${b.social.linkedin}. - Internal URLs: ${b.internalUrls.join(', ')}. - External refs (use 2+): ${b.externalReferences.join(', ')}. - Verified case studies ONLY: ${b.verifiedCaseStudies.map(c => `${c.name} (${c.metric}, ${c.outcome})`).join(' | ')}. - Font: ${b.fontStack} 34 NON-NEGOTIABLE RULES: 1. Real social links (FB/Twitter/LinkedIn — exact URLs above) in About the Author. 2. Logo in About the Author wraps in . 3. About the Author shows logo + name + description + phone + email + address + social icons + Contact button. 4. TOC anchor text has NO numeric prefix (never "1. Intro" in the clickable text). 5. TOC placed after the first intro paragraph — never first element, never later than second content block. 6. TOC and FAQ use
/ and are COLLAPSED by default (no "open" attribute). 7. TOC/FAQ clean modern design: 14px radius, #e2e5ea border, hover #f7fbf3, chevron rotates 0.3s on open. 8. MINIMUM two mid-article CTAs (one green-tinted, one dark navy) pointing to ${b.contactUrl}. 9. STRONG end-of-article CTA block on dark navy with action verb, points to ${b.contactUrl}. 10. Weave phone (${b.phoneHref}) and email (mailto:${b.email}) into body at least once each outside the author block. 11. Floating Contact Us: fixed bottom-right 24px (16px mobile), minimum 44x44 tap, hover effect, never overlaps Scroll-to-Top. 12. Floating Scroll-to-Top: fixed bottom-right above Contact (bottom 96px), appears only after 300px scroll via a small inline script toggling .pp-visible, smooth scroll on click. 13. At least 3 Tip/How-To/Did-You-Know callouts (suggest 2 Tip amber, 1 How-To green, 2 Did-You-Know indigo). 14. EXACTLY ONE

(hero only). Every other heading is

or

. 15. Minimum 2 internal links to internal URLs list, minimum 2 external links to approved external refs. 16. No Lorem Ipsum, no empty image containers, minimum ~2,500 body words. 17. Real H2/H3 hierarchy, real lists, real tables, figure+caption images. 18. NO dates, years, or time phrases in the hero, first paragraph, Key Takeaways, or anything before the TOC. 19. Responsive via ONE scoped

nodes.name: Load System Prompt
nodes.notes: Embeds all 34 rules + structure + CTA labels dynamically against the extracted brand object.

nodes.name: Prepare Prompt Context
nodes.notes: Merges webhook input (topic, keyword, word count, images) with brand intel and the system prompt.

nodes.name: Generate Article (AI)
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o with the 34-rule system prompt. Swap for any other chat model by replacing this node.

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitize Output
nodes.notes: Enforces the rule set post-generation. Returns { passed, errors[], warnings[], stats{} } alongside the article.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns { success, html, validation } to the webhook caller.
